candidates.title: Claim with evidence attached
candidates.text: A claim with direct evidence, clear framing, and obvious audience relevance.
candidates.description: The submission contains a specific angle, proof, and a usable hook.

candidates.title: Clip with obvious crowd response
candidates.text: A clip that already has momentum, clear context, and a strong reaction loop.
candidates.description: Includes a clear payoff and a comment pattern that suggests repeatability.

candidates.title: Interesting prompt, weak explanation
candidates.text: The direction might work, but the submission is still vague.

candidates.title: Old link with weak relevance
candidates.text: It exists, but there is not much reason to elevate it now.

candidates.title: Pure noise post
candidates.text: No context, no source, and no reason to act on it.
